items.text: Taurus rising. Venus 10h Aquarius. NN Capricorn 10h Retrograde. Saturn Capricorn 10h. Dream is to be wealthy enough to have everything I want, mainly a house of my own with a swimming pool, and a bunch of my own dogs. Traveling, improving every part of my life and self, having good food, very extensive list. Haven’t noticed a pattern of lessons other than karma being very obvious to me in every way.
taurus rising. nn 2h gemini. saturn rx gemini 2h. scorpio venus 7h. i’m looost on everything

I’m a Taurus rising and MAN do I check all those boxes lmao but my Venus is in Scorpio in the 6th house, north node is in Libra also the 6th house & my Saturn is in Aries in the 12th 🥲 aside from the obvious of being wealthy (realistically just comfortable, I just want to amount to something big in life. Career-wise, status, meaningful & lasting impact in my community (lgbtq+). And realistically, I feel like I’ve attracted a lot of narcissistic people (who were either close friends or family) and have been learning the repeated lesson of not being passive & having boundaries in all aspects of my life.

3h venus, 11h saturn, 5h north node. I want to be a full time painter. My life has been nonstop struggle and tragedy. For example, I just spent the last 3yrs moving up at my job but my new coworker got me demoted bc they are obsessed w me. Looking for a new job now.
12H venus, 4H Saturn, 6H NN. Dream: balance. Attract: generally lucky. Opposite of that is people assume I'm stronger than I am
Whew… idk if I have the space or energy to type all this out 😩

aries venus/nn (12th) (there are some more), cancer saturn (3rd). For context, I'm F21 closeted lesbian 5th year medical student. If i could really be anything careerwise, I'd like to be a thai gl actress and a doctor (not sure which one would be the side job tho). Other than career, I'd like to have my sexuality accepted by my family as well and to be friends with a lot of different yet higly competent people. Things that I just know I'll do is to pursue culinary school just for the sake of it, because I love to cook, and probably other types of arts, humanities and sciences degrees as well. I'd also like to do my residency in a great hospital so I can see a lot of interesting cases, and after my training, have enought time to practice the sports that I love and don't be so away from my family - I was kinda an outcast in my family and school as I grew up.
I attract a lot of people with mental health problems, specially friends, and small-minded people - most don't aim much for themselves and so they never expect me to achieve what I do. I also tend to attract things that I speak about. Also I kinda attract really important decisions with a close choice-deadline, so life-changing events are kinda frequent and filled with impulsivity. I also tend to take dumb decisions because of blind trust or unreciprocrated love.

Taurus rising Venus in the 7th house in Scorpio and I’m feeling LOST. North Node in Capricorn with Pisces Saturn 🪐 my dream is to create community and influence people through my personality and my abundance. I attract emotionally unavailable people who need to work on vulnerability and emotional intelligence
Taurus rising, Venus in leo 5th house, NN in Aries 12th house, Saturn in Sag 8th House. Dream to build something great and a lasting legacy.

taurus rising here. venus in leo 4h, north node in Sagittarius 7h, Saturn in Aquarius 10 h. ive been attracting emotional unavailable ppl lately.
what r my dreams, i just wanna live a slow life, tend to my garden and feed the chicken

Venus in 1H at 4°, NN in 11H at 23°, Saturn in 9H at 1°. I need surgery to cure me. Currently on medical leave for an underdiagnosed disease. I have a dream of creating a software that fixes this for others enduring this. Also been “through it” for many years — probably 20. However, a lot of that has to do with my current physical crisis (which didn’t become a true crisis until 2 months ago). Lessons: stop being so damn generous and caring so much.

Taurus rising, nn 9th ♑️, Venus 4th (5th w/placidus)♌️, Saturn 10th ♒️; My dream life would be to run some type of 3rd space that feels like home for people to connect with others, build found family/community and feel safe showing up as their truest selves. And for that to be able to support financial stability. Also plenty of time in nature. I have attracted many lessons in letting go, prioritizing internal validation over people pleasing, and allowing myself to be seen.

Venus in my 6th house Libra
NN cap
Saturn 8th house sag
karmic lessons with my daughter's father
going through beginning stages of separation after a 911 call was made

Taurus rising, Libra Venus in the 6th house… Saturn is Taurus in 12th or 1st depending & my north node is in Leo (4th house) dreams: ummm hmmm I’d say freedom. Beautiful home, big backyard,able to travel…
Taurus rising 1H,Venus Virgo-5H,NN Capricorn 9H,Saturn Taurus 1H(29 degrees)
Aries Sun, Taurus Rising, Leo Moon, Taurus Venus… Scorpio in 7th house of relationships… I feel like I will forever be alone
I love how everyone has the same dreams 🥹

Taurus rising: 7H Scorpio Venus; 12H Aries NN; 8H Sag Saturn. my dream is find a job that I enjoy, find my forever home and for my health to cooperate. I always attract lessons in love (my 7H says it all).

Venus in Libra, 6H.
Saturn in Libra, 6H.
North Node in Leo, 4H.
I grew up dreaming of being a writer but that's all I really cared about.
Now, I just want to feel stable. these past few months has had a lot of life decision changes.
I attract people that need advice or instruction on how to do things. I'm a Virgo Sun so I do it automatically.

Taurus rising here! My Venus is in Aries 12th house, my NN is in Taurus 1st house and my Saturn is in cancer 3rd house. My dream is to be able to share what I have in my soul through art, writing, public speaking etc. and people not only to want to receive it, but to get truly touched from it!
Venus in Libra in the 6th, north node in Leo 4h, Saturn 1h Taurus. I want to be comfortable, stable and full of abundance. I feel like I attract the opposite of those things.

Taurus rising. Saturn in the 12th in Aries, nn in Virgo. Venus in Sagittarius 8th house. Lost all my family, foster care survivor. Had job trouble all my life up until 2 years ago I found something I wanna stick with. I attract people who are a little troubled but try to be stable. I’ve learned a lot of lessons. My dreams are to be a business owner and to be financially free to travel the world. My life lesson is def something to do with boundaries and letting people use me as a servant/ I try to fix everyone. I thrive in alone time
taurus rising, venus in cancer 3H, north node scorpio 7H, saturn in pisces 11H

Taurus rising. Venus and NN in 7H Scorpio. Saturn 11H. Dreams = have a truly meaningful but also glamorous job lol, travel, more higher ed (I’d redo my undergrad to make it much better if time travel was possible, honestly, as it keeps me up at night). Attract = small-minded people or constricting situations :(, opportunities that make me reevaluate “meaning,” strange lore bc i look trustworthy and ppl just reveal shit to me lol

Taurus rising with Venus in pisces in 11th house, north node in Leo in 3rd house and Saturn in Taurus in 12th house. I have a dream of being noticed for my talent. I sing and I dance and I can act and I want to share it with the world. With Saturn in Taurus in 12th house I had body image issues. So I restricted food for a very long time to look a certain way. But I want to mention I have a stellium in Taurus in 12th house with mars and Jupiter there. I have everything that it takes to get out of a toxic cycle. I'm also very spiritual and psychic. I feel behind in so many ways like everything is delayed. But I've learned that it's just about timing. When time comes everything will fall in place and all this waiting period will pay off. I also wanna mention I'm an 11th house stellium too so I'm a dreamer and with an Aries sun I take action towards those dreams. My part is done and the rest is in god's hands.

Taurus rising, 12 house Aries north node, 8 house stellium on sag (Saturn,venus,Uranus,sun(0 degree)), 39 years old women still couldnt her shit together, money problem,relationshits end up always being cheated, friends always stay around only when they have benefits,I have autism very effective spectrum so it’s causes pattern recognition unconsciously about everything I mean everything even about someone’s breath, when I met someone they get triggered first,I’m isolated myself for 5 years from everything that was the most peaceful years in my life, and also I have 3 time near of dead experiences so basically I think I’m living in this life 50%-%50, mercury and Pluto also in Scorpio 7th house so I have many curse 🤷🏻‍♀️which one do you like to talk about

Taurus rising, virgo Venus 5th house, NN in virgo 5th house, Saturn in Aries 12th house... I want to travel and keep learning and have a more interesting and fulfilling life, I want to create things and help others too

Taurus rising (Venus in Virgo 5H // NN in Scorpio 7H // Saturn in Pisces 11H). ▪️DREAMS: sustainably tour the world with my music + art, researcher in botany + animals, and be a grief doula. ▪️LESSONS: achieving my goals through abstract paths, randomly stumbling into multidisciplinary opportunities, SO MUCH DEATH especially elders passing, many friends that take advantage of my care, intense people with unhealed mother wounds.

Im taurus rising and taurus venus and taurus northnode taurus mercury and taurus lilith and saturn in 2nd house gemini and part of fortune there too i think my lesson is money, myself, relationship with fam, my view in life really grow yearly in beautiful way im so greatful its not easy but i learn alot anyways inferness i always have something to eat and im so greatful for it then i dream to have my own place like my own house and lot,and be financially capable & stable thats it
Taurus rising, Taurus venus in the 1st house at 11 degrees, Capricon NN in the 9th house at 25 degrees, and Saturn in Aquarius in the 10th house at 4degrees

Taurus Rising
12th North Node aries
7th Venus Scorpio
Lost my job, and my ex who came back into my life 6 months ago played in my face. All within 2 weeks. (Breakup convo happened on the start of mercury retrograde)

sag venus 8h, nn libra 6h saturn in aries 12h (1st degree!) before my saturn return I uprooted my whole life lost 30 lbs gained new hobbies and just shifted my mindset to not giving a fuck. yeah i’m struggling but im kind of just seeing where life takes me and trying to get out of the lack and fear mindset rn. possibilities are endless and I don’t have to have everything perfect for good things to come!
Taurus rising, Venus in Libra in my 6th house, Saturn at 0 degrees Capricorn in my 8th (conjunct my Uranus at 29 degrees Sagittarius 🙃), north node in Pisces in my 11th (conjunct my moon).

'm going through it and idk what to do anymore😭 like I'm currently in therapy because that's what's saving me and Lexapro🫠 my Venus is in 3rd house cancer, my north node is in 7th house scorpio, and my saturn is in 11th house pisces. all I want is financial stability, a stable job🫠 I'm so tired of working in toxic places, I just want to work and go home. my career is boring but unfortunately management has always been toxic for me. I wish I could be a kindergarten teacher again but it doesn't pay well so I'm stuck working in tech. my lesson I think based on the nodes is I'm too hyper independent and need to depend on others more but I don't have anyone to rely on, not even family so it sucks. I just have a handful of friends.
Venus 12th house in Aries

venus Scorpio 7th house, Saturn 12th Aries, nn gemini 3rd house
my dream is to have a dessert pastry shop

Taurus rising Venus 8H Sagittarius, Scorpio NN 7H, Pisces Saturn 12H honestly my only dreams are to be happy healthy and financially free I attract people romantically and platonically who want to control me and keep me hidden away in a box
Saturn in the first Taurus, Cancer North Node in the 3 house and Pisces Venus in the 11th house. My dream is having better career and travel learning new things
A Taurus rising my NN is Taurus first house my venues is Sagittarius in my 8 house my Saturn is Sagittarius 8 house
Taurus rising - ♑️venus in 9H, ♈️north node in 11H, ♐️saturn 8H. Honestly, current dream is just for stability and an easy life. I attract people that are going through transition periods.

Taurus AC. Venus retrograde in Gemini 2H, Pisces NN 11H and Saturn retrograde in Sagittarius 8H. My dream is working in Tech, have a quiet stable life. I attract chaos. We’re going through it because Pluto is square Pluto
Gemini North Node & Saturn rx 2H, Capricorn Venus 10H🫠. I want my own business (food), also real estate. I attract users, because I’m a giver.

Taurus rising (Taurus 12th stellium), Gemini Venus 2nd, Saturn Capricorn 8th (stellium), NN Pisces 11th. I want to be spoiled financially. I want freedom, fun, friends, luxury, peace & to never work again. I feel like I attract ppl who always need/want something from me. I’m always the person with the funds.
Taurus rising. 1H Taurus Venus. 8H Cap NN. 10H Aquarius Saturn.

Taurus rising, Venus and North node in the 6th house libra. Saturn In pisces 11th house. Major lessons in my relationships, in social circles and power struggles, disfunctional family, losing jobs, hard time finding a Job that allows me to fullfill my needs both spiritual and economical. I never had a dream because it feels im not allowed to it but if I can chose something it Would be big power with big responsibilities and big money that allows me to help people, create jobs and a luxurious lifestyle for me and all of my people. I would love to cherish my money and knowledge with others.

I'm a triple Taurus. 29 degrees rising. Venus at 3 degree Cancer second house, my North node is 29 degrees Gemini, Saturn 29 degree Libra. It started with Uranus entering Taurus. I've lost everything but my mom. And I really think the only reason she survived was so I didn't die. My job, boyfriend, 2 homes, my health, I've gained and lost 75 lbs twice. I have none of the friends I made in my twenties or thirties. All types of shit. I've moved to 3 states.
if I could have anything it would be a permanent stability in the form of a small homestead
Venus in 10th pisces, NN in pisces 10th. Everything went to sh*t, never felt so alone in my life. Dont know where to go what to do, just want to die you know?
taurus rising sag venus 8h, north node in gemini in 2h & saturn gemini 1h, the only dream i have is safety and stability in myself and life

Taurus rising Libra Venus 6th North N in Sag 7th Saturn Aquarius 10th I wanna live a quiet peaceful life travel live in a beautiful small town somewhere in Spain or Scotland not having to work to survive have enough money to take care of myself and choose a job that don’t feel like a job ,I need some nice views some architecture ….
